pr.title: Non-record: 10L E2E TTT-Linear + FlowRefiner — val_bpb 1.1347 (README request)

output.summary: 10-layer transformer pairs E2E TTT-Linear refinement with one-step latent FlowRefiner inspired by FLOWR plus int6/int8 quantization to stay within 16MB.
techniques: Per-head E2E TTT-Linear inner-loop SGD during train+eval
One-step latent FlowRefiner with Euler-style update
Mixed int6/int8 per-row quantization and lzma compression
